summary: Completed comprehensive testing of profile navigation and follow/unfollow functionality. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features verified working - profile routes, follow/unfollow, navigation from search/feed to profiles, back button, privacy (Saved tab).

minor.priority: LOW - does not affect profile navigation

critical_code_review_comments: Profile.js correctly uses useParams() to detect userId from URL
isOwnProfile logic correctly compares userId with user.id from AuthContext
Follow/Message buttons only show on other users' profiles (correct)
Edit profile/Settings buttons only show on own profile (correct)
Saved tab correctly hidden on other users' profiles (privacy preserved)
Back button shows with user's name on other profiles
Feed.js correctly navigates to /profile/{author_id} when clicking post author
Explore.js correctly navigates to /profile/{user.id} when clicking search results
Follow API uses query params (?follower_id=) which works correctly

verified_features.OWN PROFILE /profile (no userId) shows c: PASS - Edit profile button, Settings, Saved tab visible

seed_data_creation: Created testprofile_ui@example.com user for UI testing, updated subscription_tier to 'free'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile navigation fully tested and working. All features from the fix are verified: viewing other profiles, follow/unfollow, search-to-profile navigation, feed-to-profile navigation. The Explore trending endpoint returns 500 but it's unrelated to profile navigation. App.js has /profile and /profile/:userId routes. Profile.js uses useParams() to get userId.
